{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 6.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-131", "name": "Incorrect Calculation of Buffer Size"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-190", "name": "Integer Overflow or Wraparound"}], "description": "### Summary
`jxl-oxide` exposes a public safe API that can construct an undersized `FrameBuffer` due to unchecked `usize` multiplication, which immediately trigger panic while initializing the buffer in normal decoding path.

Additionally, calling the safe grouped buffer accessors afterward can create invalid oversized slices from a much smaller allocation, causing undefined behavior; however normal decoding path never reaches UB, because these methods are never used within `jxl-oxide`.

### Impact
On 32-bit platforms this can cause panic by accessing out-of-range indices, making it a DoS vulnerability.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-66m8-c62j-h6v5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T20:45:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-66m8-c62j-h6v5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-66m8-c62j-h6v5"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-02T20:45:10Z", "references": ["https://github.com/tirr-c/jxl-oxide/security/advisories/GHSA-66m8-c62j-h6v5", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-66m8-c62j-h6v5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tirr-c/jxl-oxide/security-advisories/GHSA-66m8-c62j-h6v5", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tirr-c/jxl-oxide", "summary": "jxl-oxide: `FrameBuffer::new` creates out-of-bounds slices on overflow", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T20:45:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-66m8-c62j-h6v5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.12.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "jxl-oxide"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.12.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: jxl-oxide: `FrameBuffer::new` creates out-of-bounds slices on overflow
